mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products ( category_id, product_code, product_name, product_subname, summary, description, thumbnail_url, status, is_featured, is_active, exposure_start_at, exposure_end_at, seo_title, seo_description, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{categoryId}, #{productCode}, #{productName}, #{productSubname}, #{summary}, #{description}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{status}, #{isFeatured}, #{isActive}, #{exposureStartAt}, #{exposureEndAt}, #{seoTitle}, #{seoDescription}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET category_id = #{categoryId}, product_name = #{productName}, product_subname = #{productSubname}, summary = #{summary}, description = #{description}, thumbnail_url = #{thumbnailUrl}, status = #{status}, is_featured = #{isFeatured}, is_active = #{isActive}, exposure_start_at = #{exposureStartAt}, exposure_end_at = #{exposureEndAt}, seo_title = #{seoTitle}, seo_description = #{seoDescription}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId}
UPDATE products SET is_active = 'N', updated_at = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{id} AND is_active = 'Y'
